label: Planet layer settings
description: Camera and rendering geometry values for a planet layer.

origin.label: Origin
origin.description: World-space origin offset for this planet layer.

radius.label: Radius
radius.description: Radius of the planet sphere for this layer.

viewAngle.label: View angle
viewAngle.description: Camera view angle used when rendering this planet layer.

extraCameraAltitude.label: Extra camera altitude
extraCameraAltitude.description: Additional camera altitude applied when viewing this planet layer.

subdivisions.label: Subdivisions
subdivisions.description: Number of mesh subdivisions used to generate the planet sphere for this layer.

useSurfaceViewAngle.label: Use surface view angle
useSurfaceViewAngle.description: If true, this layer uses the surface layer's view angle instead of its own viewAngle value.

backgroundWorldCameraOffset.label: Background world camera offset
backgroundWorldCameraOffset.description: Camera offset applied when this layer is rendered as a background world.

backgroundWorldCameraParallaxDistancePer.label: Background world camera parallax distance per 100 cells
backgroundWorldCameraParallaxDistancePer.description: Parallax distance applied per 100 cells when this layer is rendered as a background world.
